scenarios.title: Notebook-to-production anti-pattern
scenarios.code:
# production_model.py (copied from notebook)
import pandas as pd
df = pd.read_csv('data.csv')  # hardcoded path
df = df.dropna()  # silently drops rows
df['feature1'] = df['col_a'] / df['col_b']  # division by zero?
from sklearn.ensemble import RandomForestClassifier
model = RandomForestClassifier(n_estimators=100)
model.fit(df[['feature1', 'col_c']], df['label'])
# No tests, no validation, no monitoring, no versioning
expectedFindings: Silent data dropping (no validation of what was dropped)
Potential division by zero in feature engineering
No model validation or performance benchmarks
